qa_pairs.question: What is the current status of Helios?
What kind of system was Hélios?
What type of nodes was the Hélios supercomputer composed of?
qa_pairs.answer: The Hélios supercomputer was composed of graphical processing unit (GPGPU) nodes.

qa_pairs.question: Where was Hélios installed?
qa_pairs.answer: Hélios was installed in the computing centre at Université Laval.

qa_pairs.question: When was interactive access to Hélios interrupted?
qa_pairs.answer: Interactive access to Hélios was interrupted on October 26, 2022.

qa_pairs.question: Why was interactive access to Hélios interrupted?
qa_pairs.answer: Interactive access was interrupted in anticipation of its decommissioning.

qa_pairs.question: How can data be extracted from Hélios?
qa_pairs.answer: Data can be extracted using the Globus drop-off point.
